headline: Should 3M’s (MMM) Azure AI Optics Partnership With Microsoft Prompt a Rethink for Investors?
summary: On July 15, 2026, 3M Company announced a partnership with Microsoft in which Azure will be the first hyperscale cloud to deploy 3M’s Expanded Beam Optical technology in its AI-focused data centers, while 3M adopts Microsoft’s AI and digital platforms across core business functions. This collaboration highlights how 3M is pairing its materials science and optical connectivity strengths with Microsoft’s cloud infrastructure to support AI infrastructure growth and modernize 3M’s internal...

headline: JPMorgan upgrades 3M, Emerson Electric to Overweight ahead of earnings
summary: Investing.com -- JPMorgan upgraded shares of 3M and Emerson Electric to Overweight from Neutral ahead of upcoming quarterly earnings, citing improving growth prospects, supportive end-market trends and expectations for stronger earnings momentum into 2027.

headline: 3M (MMM) Teams Up With Microsoft As Its Undervalued Narrative Faces A Valuation Test
summary: 3M (MMM) has drawn fresh attention after announcing a partnership with Microsoft that links its Expanded Beam Optical technology to Azure data centers and brings Microsoft AI tools into 3M's own operations. See our latest analysis for 3M. Recent events around AI and data centers have coincided with 3M's share price moving to $161.77, with a 7 day share price return of 4.14% and a 90 day share price return of 4.67%. headline: Can 3M (MMM) Still Trade At A Discount After PFAS Lawsuit?
summary: 3M stock has more than doubled over the past three years, while current checks suggest the shares trade below an intrinsic value estimate based on a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) approach and also screen as undervalued on traditional earnings multiples. At the same time, a mixed broader valuation score and fresh legal action over PFAS chemicals mean the gap between price and estimated value is not a straightforward story. 3M has delivered a 103.6% return over the last three years, which puts...
